section_name: Use of Grant or Gift According to Terms
text: The department shall use money, property, or a grant given to the department under this chapter according to the terms of the grant or gift.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.057 — Use of Grant or Gift According to Terms

The department shall use money, property, or a grant given to the department under this chapter according to the terms of the grant or gift.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall use money, property, or a grant given to the department under this chapter according to the terms of the grant or gift.
